fact: Issei's signature move, 'Dress Break', was invented purely out of his perverse desires and works by destroying the magical energy flowing through a target's clothing to strip them instantly.
Sona Sitri's ultimate life dream is to establish a Rating Game academy in the Underworld that provides equal opportunities to lower-class and reincarnated devils.

The animation studio for the anime was switched from TNK to Passione for the fourth season, High School DxD Hero, in order to adopt an art style that more closely matched Miyama-Zero's original light novel illustrations.
Despite being a vampire and a devil, Gasper is an extreme shut-in who loves human internet culture, video games, and hiding inside a cardboard box to feel secure.

Mutation Pieces are incredibly rare Evil Pieces that only occur in 1 out of 10 sets. They are required to reincarnate exceptionally powerful individuals who would otherwise cost multiple standard chess pieces.
Author Ichiei Ishibumi based the lore of the twin Heavenly Dragons, Ddraig and Albion, directly on the historical Welsh myth of the red and white dragons fighting under Dinas Emrys.
Despite being one of the terrifying Four Great Satans ruling the Underworld, Sirzechs has a secret hobby of cosplaying as magical girls from human anime series to pass the time.
Kuroka was branded a stray devil not out of malice, but because she assassinated her former master to prevent him from performing cruel, fatal biological experiments on her younger sister, Koneko.

Ophis, the Infinite Dragon God, is completely genderless and lacks biological traits, but voluntarily chose to manifest as a young human girl because she found the appearance convenient for physical interactions.

The original Excalibur was a singular, god-tier holy weapon that was shattered into seven distinct fragments by the God of the Bible during ancient times because its baseline power was too massive for humans to control safely.
